headline: Marriott Taps Lefay To Expand Luxury Wellness And Fee Based Growth
summary: Marriott International (NasdaqGS:MAR) has formed a joint venture with Italian luxury wellness brand Lefay. The agreement brings Lefay into Marriott’s portfolio as a dedicated luxury wellness offering. The tie up is designed to expand Lefay using Marriott’s global development capabilities while keeping the brand’s Italian identity. For Marriott, a company known for its wide range of hotel and resort brands, this move opens a new corner of high end hospitality focused on wellness and...

headline: Marriott International Named a Top 10 Fortune and Great Place To Work® 100 Best Workplaces in the U.S., Reflecting Nearly 100 Years of Putting People First
summary: Marriott International has been named the Number 7 Best Workplace in the United States on the 2026 Fortune and Great Place To Work® 100 Best Workplaces list, a recognition that reflects the company's enduring commitment to its associates and its people-first culture. Marriott has been on the list since its inception nearly three decades ago. This year's ranking follows the company's global recognition as a best-in-class employer by Fortune and Great Place to Work® in over a dozen countries aroun

headline: Yum! Brands Appoints Former Marriott International CFO Kathleen (Leeny) K. Oberg to Board
summary: LOUISVILLE, Ky., April 01, 2026--Yum! Brands, Inc. (NYSE: YUM) today announced the appointment of Kathleen (Leeny) K. Oberg, former Chief Financial Officer and Executive Vice President, Development of Marriott International, Inc., to its Board of Directors, effective April 1, 2026.

raw.headline: Yum! Brands Appoints Former Marriott International CFO Kathleen (Leeny) K. Oberg to Board

headline: Marriott enters luxury wellness with Lefay brand deal
summary: Through a new joint venture, Marriott plans to scale the Italian resort brand globally as travelers increasingly seek “transformative travel experiences focused on health and longevity.”
